name: sap agents list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT SlpCode, SlpName, Active, Memo FROM dbo.OSLP ORDER BY SlpName OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customers list extended
body_template: {"query":"SELECT c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.CardType, c.GroupCode, c.Phone1, c.Cellular, c.E_Mail, c.Address, c.City, c.Country, c.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, c.VatStatus AS IsTaxable, c.frozenFor AS IsFrozen, c.validFor AS IsActive, c.Discount AS DiscountPercent, c.CreditLine AS CreditLimit, c.LicTradNum AS FederalTaxID FROM dbo.OCRD c LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = c.SlpCode WHERE c.CardType = 'C' ORDER BY c.CardCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap products list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT ItemCode, ItemName, ItmsGrpCod, FirmCode, VatGourpSa, CodeBars, SellItem, InvntItem, PrchseItem, OnHand, IsCommited, OnOrder, AvgPrice, LastPurPrc, LastPurCur, SWeight1, ManSerNum, ManBtchNum, validFor, frozenFor FROM dbo.OITM ORDER BY ItemCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap warehouses list
body_template: {"query":"SELECT WhsCode, WhsName, Street, City, Country, Locked FROM dbo.OWHS ORDER BY WhsCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap price lists
body_template: {"query":"SELECT ListNum, ListName, BASE_NUM, Factor, RoundSys, GroupCode, IsGrossPrc FROM dbo.OPLN ORDER BY ListNum OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customers price lists
body_template: {"query":"SELECT c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.ListNum AS PriceListNum, p.ListName AS PriceListName FROM dbo.OCRD c LEFT JOIN dbo.OPLN p ON p.ListNum = c.ListNum WHERE c.CardType = 'C' ORDER BY c.CardCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap alternate catalog codes only
body_template: {"query":"SELECT CardCode, ItemCode, Substitute AS AlternateCatNum FROM dbo.OSCN ORDER BY CardCode, ItemCode OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap orders by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT o.DocEntry, o.DocNum, o.DocDate, o.DocDueDate, o.CardCode, o.CardName, o.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, o.DocCur, o.DocRate, o.DocTotal, o.VatSum, o.DiscSum, o.PaidToDate, o.DocStatus, o.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDR o LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = o.SlpCode WHERE o.CardCode = @CardCode AND o.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND o.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY o.DocDate DESC, o.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}

name: sap orders for agents
body_template: {"query":"SELECT o.DocEntry, o.DocNum, o.DocDate, o.DocDueDate, o.CardCode, o.CardName, o.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, o.DocCur, o.DocRate, o.DocTotal, o.VatSum, o.DiscSum, o.PaidToDate, o.DocStatus, o.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDR o LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = o.SlpCode WHERE o.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND o.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY o.DocDate DESC, o.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap quotations by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OQUT d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.ORDN d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OINV d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.CardCode = @CardCode AND d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}","CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}

body_template: {"query":"SELECT d.DocEntry, d.DocNum, d.DocDate, d.DocDueDate, d.CardCode, d.CardName, d.SlpCode AS SalesPersonCode, s.SlpName AS SalesPersonName, d.DocCur, d.DocRate, d.DocTotal, d.VatSum, d.DiscSum, d.PaidToDate, d.DocStatus, d.CANCELED FROM dbo.OCSI d LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = d.SlpCode WHERE d.DocDate >= @dateFrom AND d.DocDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY d.DocDate DESC, d.DocEntry DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}},"dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap quotation (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.QUT1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.OQUT T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap order (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RDR1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORDR T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap delivery (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.DLN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ODLN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap return (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RDN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORDN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R invoice (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.INV1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.OINV T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R credit memo (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.RIN1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ORIN T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap A/R down payment (header + rows) by document number
body_template: {"query":"SELECT (SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.CardCode, T0.CardName, T0.DocTotal, T0.DocCur, (SELECT T1.LineNum, T1.ItemCode, T1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, T1.Quantity, T1.Price, T1.WhsCode FROM dbo.DPI1 T1 WHERE T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry ORDER BY T1.LineNum FOR JSON PATH) AS DocumentLines FROM dbo.ODPI T0 WHERE T0.DocNum = @documentNumber FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) AS OrderData","params":{"documentNumber":{{documentNumber}}}}

name: sap customer purchase history by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.DocEntry, t0.DocNum, t0.DocDate, t0.CardCode, t0.CardName, t1.ItemCode, t1.Dscription AS ItemDescription, t1.Quantity, t1.Price, t1.LineTotal, t1.WhsCode, t0.DocCur FROM dbo.ORDR t0 INNER JOIN dbo.RDR1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode AND t1.ItemCode = @ItemCode ORDER BY t0.DocDate DESC OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY","params":{"CardCode":"{{CardCode}}","ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}","offset":{{offset}},"limit":{{limit}}}}

name: sap customer debits
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t1.TransId, t0.RefDate, t0.BaseRef AS DocNum, t1.ShortName AS CardCode, t1.Line_ID, t1.Debit, t1.Ref1, t1.LineMemo FROM dbo.OJDT t0 INNER JOIN dbo.JDT1 t1 ON t0.BatchNum = t1.BatchNum WHERE t1.ShortName = @CardCode AND t1.Debit > 0 AND t0.RefDate >= @dateFrom AND t0.RefDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY t0.RefDate DESC","params":{"CardCode":"{{CardCode}}","dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap customer journal
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t1.TransId, t0.RefDate, t0.BaseRef AS DocNum, t1.ShortName AS CardCode, t1.LineMemo, t1.Debit, t1.Credit, (t1.Debit - t1.Credit) AS NetAmount, t0.TransType FROM dbo.OJDT t0 INNER JOIN dbo.JDT1 t1 ON t0.BatchNum = t1.BatchNum WHERE t1.ShortName = @CardCode AND t0.RefDate >= @dateFrom AND t0.RefDate <= @dateTo ORDER BY t0.RefDate DESC, t1.TransId DESC","params":{"CardCode":"{{CardCode}}","dateFrom":"{{dateFrom}}","dateTo":"{{dateTo}}"}}

name: sap warehouse stock detailed by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.ItemCode, t1.ItemName, t0.WhsCode, t2.WhsName, t0.OnHand, t0.IsCommited, t0.OnOrder, (t0.OnHand + t0.OnOrder - t0.IsCommited) AS Available FROM dbo.OITW t0 INNER JOIN dbo.OITM t1 ON t0.ItemCode = t1.ItemCode INNER JOIN dbo.OWHS t2 ON t0.WhsCode = t2.WhsCode WHERE t0.ItemCode = @ItemCode AND (t0.OnHand <> 0 OR t0.OnOrder <> 0 OR t0.IsCommited <> 0) ORDER BY t0.WhsCode","params":{"ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}"}}

name: sap warehouse stock detailed by SKU
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.ItemCode, t1.ItemName, t0.WhsCode, t2.WhsName, t0.OnHand, t0.IsCommited, t0.OnOrder, (t0.OnHand + t0.OnOrder - t0.IsCommited) AS Available FROM dbo.OITW t0 INNER JOIN dbo.OITM t1 ON t0.ItemCode = t1.ItemCode INNER JOIN dbo.OWHS t2 ON t0.WhsCode = t2.WhsCode WHERE t0.ItemCode = @ItemCode AND (t0.OnHand <> 0 OR t0.OnOrder <> 0 OR t0.IsCommited <> 0) ORDER BY t0.WhsCode","params":{"ItemCode":"{{ItemCode}}"}}

name: sap customer 360 profile summary
body_template: {"query":"SELECT t0.CardCode, t0.CardName, t0.Balance, t0.OrdersBal, t0.DnotesBal, t0.CreditLine, t2.SlpName AS SalesAgent, t0.Phone1, t0.E_Mail, t0.CntctPrsn FROM dbo.OCRD t0 LEFT JOIN dbo.OSLP t2 ON t0.SlpCode = t2.SlpCode WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode","params":{"CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}

name: sap unique itemcodes bought by customer
body_template: {"query":"SELECT DISTINCT T.ItemCode FROM (SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.OINV t0 INNER JOIN dbo.INV1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode UNION SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.ODLN t0 INNER JOIN dbo.DLN1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode UNION SELECT t1.ItemCode FROM dbo.ORDR t0 INNER JOIN dbo.RDR1 t1 ON t0.DocEntry = t1.DocEntry WHERE t0.CardCode = @CardCode) T ORDER BY T.ItemCode","params":{"CardCode":"{{CardCode}}"}}
